description.p: Word Hunter is a desktop language-learning workspace for reading real texts, saving vocabulary with context, and reviewing words later.
It supports imported text, PDFs, EPUB files, subtitles, public-domain book discovery, local vocabulary storage, spaced repetition, text to speech, and optional offline translation models.

screenshot.caption: Reading view with vocabulary highlights and word details

ul.li: Fixed Flatpak sync folder selection so the chosen folder is stored only after a successful sync and uses XDG config/data locations.
Fixed Flatpak/Linux OCR GPU platform detection for more reliable startup diagnostics.
Bundled the Flatpak CPU OCR runner, PDFium library, and PaddleOCR models so scanned-PDF OCR works in the Linux package.
Refreshed Windows packaging so installer and portable builds include the required GNU runtime DLLs.
Added Linux Flatpak packaging with AppStream metadata and local install helpers.
Improved PDF reading with page-background overlays, selectable words, and a clean text mode.
Improved Android Pocket PDF rendering with zooming, horizontal panning, and text-layer spacing fixes.
Hardened local-first storage, backup, recovery, and sync compatibility paths.
